phase1.code:
// ---- Project: Ship to Play Store ----

// ---- Build configuration ----
// In build.gradle.kts (app)

/*
android {
    // ...
    
    defaultConfig {
        applicationId = "com.example.taskmaster"
        minSdk = 24
        targetSdk = 34
        versionCode = 1
        versionName = "1.0.0"
    }
    
    signingConfigs {
        create("release") {
            storeFile = file("keystore.jks")
            storePassword = System.getenv("KEYSTORE_PASSWORD")
            keyAlias = System.getenv("KEY_ALIAS")
            keyPassword = System.getenv("KEY_PASSWORD")
        }
    }
    
    buildTypes {
        release {
            isMinifyEnabled = true
            isShrinkResources = true
            proguardFiles(
                getDefaultProguardFile("proguard-android-optimize.txt"),
                "proguard-rules.pro"
            )
            signingConfig = signingConfigs.getByName("release")
        }
    }
}
*/

// ---- Release checklist ----
/*
Release Checklist:

1. ✅ All features implemented
2. ✅ All tests passing
3. ✅ No debug code left
4. ✅ App icon updated
5. ✅ Screenshots ready
6. ✅ Description written
7. ✅ Privacy policy
8. ✅ Crash reporting
9. ✅ Analytics
10. ✅ Tested on multiple devices
11. ✅ Build signed
12. ✅ Uploaded to Play Console
13. ✅ Pricing set
14. ✅ Countries selected
15. ✅ Submitted for review
*/

// ---- Play Store listing content ----
/*
📱 App Name: TaskMaster

📝 Short Description:
Manage your tasks and projects efficiently with TaskMaster.

📝 Full Description:
TaskMaster is a powerful yet simple task management app designed to help you stay organized and productive.

Key Features:
✅ Create and manage tasks
✅ Set priorities (Low, Medium, High)
✅ Track task status (Todo, In Progress, Completed)
✅ Organize tasks by projects
✅ Set due dates
✅ Dark mode support
✅ Beautiful Material 3 design

Perfect for students, professionals, and anyone who wants to stay organized.

📸 Screenshots:
- Task List Screen
- Task Detail Screen
- Add Task Screen
- Projects Screen
- Settings Screen

🔒 Privacy Policy:
We don't collect any personal data. All data is stored locally on your device.

🎨 Features Graphic:
- 1024 x 500
- TaskMaster branding
- Key features

📱 App Icon:
- 512 x 512
- High resolution
- Recognizable design
*/

// ---- ProGuard rules ----
/*
# In proguard-rules.pro

# Keep data classes
-keep class com.example.taskmaster.data.** { *; }

# Keep Room
-keep class androidx.room.** { *; }
-keep interface androidx.room.** { *; }

# Keep Gson
-keep class com.google.gson.** { *; }

# Keep Hilt
-keep class dagger.hilt.** { *; }
-keep class javax.inject.** { *; }
*/

// ---- Build commands ----
/*
# Build signed APK
./gradlew assembleRelease

# Build signed AAB (recommended for Play Store)
./gradlew bundleRelease

# Generate signing key
keytool -genkey -v -keystore keystore.jks -alias key-alias -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000

# Debug signing key
./gradlew signingReport

# Verify APK
jarsigner -verify -verbose -certs app-release.apk

# Install APK
adb install app-release.apk
*/

// ---- Play Console steps ----
/*
1. Sign in to Google Play Console
2. Create new application
3. Set up store listing
4. Upload AAB/APK
5. Set pricing
6. Select countries
7. Fill content rating
8. Submit for review
9. Wait for approval
10. Release to users
*/

// ---- Post-release ----
/*
Post-release activities:

1. Monitor crash reports
2. Respond to reviews
3. Track analytics
4. Plan updates
5. Add features
6. Fix bugs
7. Improve performance
8. Increase rating

Congratulations! You've shipped your app! 🎉
*/

phase1.explanation:
🤖 **Shipping to Play Store is the final step.**

**Shipping steps:**

| Step | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 1 | Build signed release |
| 2 | Test on devices |
| 3 | Prepare store listing |
| 4 | Upload to Play Console |
| 5 | Submit for review |
| 6 | Release |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Ship it! You built an app from scratch."

**Post-release:**

| Activity | Why |
|----------|-----|
| Monitor crashes | Fix issues |
| Respond to reviews | Build trust |
| Track analytics | Understand users |
| Plan updates | Improve app |
phase1.openingDialogue: Ship to Play Store. Share your app. 🚀🤖

phase2.errorMessage:
1. Crashes on release
2. Can't upload
3. Poor store presence
4. Policy violation
5. Poor ratings
6. Unknown issues
